report.summary: Day 72 standup v2: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully emptied — all pages promoted. BTC $71,300 (+2.5% from yesterday's dip), Fear & Greed at 11 (up from 8, still Extreme Fear ~50 days). 21 publish batches executed today (~43 pages). Git locks remain Day 9 — deploy gap ~160 pages. Priority unchanged: clear git locks to unlock 9 days of accumulated content.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v1 (cycle 1 today): PUBLISH_QUEUE drained from 2 items to 0 — ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement guides promoted. 21 publish batches completed for Mar 25 (~43 new slugs added to PUBLISHED_PAGES).

MARKET UPDATE (live web search): BTC ~$71,300 (up from cycle 1's $69,541-71,229 — geopolitical relief rally holding after US-Iran pause). ETH market cap ~$233B. Fear & Greed Index: 11 (Extreme Fear — up 3 pts from 8, ~50-day streak continues). BTC 43% below ATH of $126,080 but holding above $70K for 3 consecutive days.
QUEUE STATUS: PUBLISH_QUEUE is now EMPTY — all built pages have been promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. This is a sprint milestone.

LOCAL METRICS: ~500+ unique entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES (some duplicates in set — staking-rewards, onchain-analytics, etc. appear twice). 1,152+ page.tsx files. Deploy gap still ~160 pages (last commit e999560, Mar 17).

TODAY'S PUBLISH OUTPUT (21 batches): Ecosystem deep-dives (Pendle, RocketPool, MakerDAO, Yearn, Ondo), 30+ learn guides spanning EIP-7702, passkey wallets, governance security, funding rate arbitrage, L2 comparisons, tokenized funds, Nasdaq equities, SocialFi, DeFi insurance, DVT, AI frameworks, RWA platforms, Verkle trees, solver networks, Aptos, privacy infra, World Chain, on/off ramps, portfolio allocation, tokenized real estate, Web3 gaming.
CONTENT VELOCITY: Mar 25 = 21 batches (~43 pages). Mar 24 = 16 batches (~32 pages). Mar 23 = 14 batches (~28 pages). Publishing velocity trending up 31% day-over-day.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE CYCLE 1: PUBLISH_QUEUE fully drained — 2 remaining items (ERC-8183 + Crypto Retirement) promoted. 21 batch comments added to published-pages.ts for Mar 25.
SPRINT MILESTONE: Queue empty for the first time. All built content is now in PUBLISHED_PAGES. No more content waiting for promotion.

BLOCKER [P0 — DAY 9]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) STILL present since Mar 16. 781+ uncommitted files. ALL content since Mar 17 is local-only. ~160 pages built but not deployed. Jefe action required: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add . → git commit → git push.
BLOCKER [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404 in production — route.ts exists locally but never committed.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading and /trading/learn return 404 — hub page.tsx missing.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: TS errors at 46 across 3 files (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, structured-data.examples.ts).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter coverage 0/6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: ~103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — will 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: Duplicate entries in PUBLISHED_PAGES set (staking-rewards, onchain-analytics, defi-insurance-guide-2026, etc.) — cosmetic but should be cleaned up.
DISK SPACE ALERT: VM disk full — bash commands failing with ENOSPC. May affect build cycle and design agents this rotation.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS + DEPLOY (DAY 9 — CRITICAL): With queue now fully empty and 500+ slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, the deploy gap is the single biggest value leak. BTC relief rally holding ($71.3K, above $70K for 3 days) means market attention is returning. One manual intervention clears 9 days of accumulated work. ROI: instant 47% increase in indexed content.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX DISK SPACE: VM is at 0 bytes free — bash/build tools completely blocked. This will prevent build cycles, design work, and QA from running. Need to clear node_modules cache, old logs, or increase disk allocation before next rotation.

PRIORITY 3 — SHIFT TO OPTIMIZATION PHASE: Queue empty = content production phase complete. Next phase should be: (1) Fix the 103 missing page.tsx files for published slugs, (2) Clean up 46 TS errors, (3) Add rate limiters to API routes, (4) Deduplicate PUBLISHED_PAGES entries, (5) Run bulk SEO audit on all 500+ pages.

STRATEGIC NOTE: With ~500 published slugs and BTC holding $70K+ amid a record Extreme Fear streak (~50 days), degen0x has a massive content moat ready to capture fear-driven search traffic — IF deployed. The Fear & Greed tick up from 8→11 suggests potential sentiment recovery. Tax deadline in 21 days creates urgency for tax content indexing. Every day without deploy = compounding opportunity cost on 160+ pages of unreachable content.
